name: SCC_CM_SLAC_Parm_Cnf
title: SCC_CM_SLAC_Parm_Cnf
syntax: void SCC_CM_SLAC_Parm_Cnf ( byte RunId[], byte SourceMacAddress[], dword NumSounds, dword TimeOut, byte ForwardingSTA[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a CM_SLAC_Parm.Cnf message is received. Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with

parameters.name: RunId
parameters.description: Random Run Identifier of sender (8 byte)
